dialogue_text: Let us get to the shore, and then I'll tell you my history, and you'll understand why it is I hate cats and dogs.
source_excerpt: So she called softly after it, "Mouse dear! Do come back again, and we won't talk about cats or dogs either, if you don't like them!" When the Mouse heard this, it turned round and swam slowly back to her: its face was quite pale (with p...
